title: Rotten Flesh +
description: RottenFleshPlus is a fabric mod that adds cooked flesh, making rotten flesh useful by allowing it to be smelted into better food.
body:
# 🥩 RottenFleshPlus

**Transform your zombie drops into delicious meals!**

RottenFleshPlus is a simple yet elegant Minecraft Fabric mod that breathes new life into one of the game's most common but least useful items. No more throwing away stacks of rotten flesh from zombie encounters!

## ✨ Features

- **🍖 Cooked Flesh**: Smelt rotten flesh into nutritious cooked flesh
- **⚡ Simple Recipe**: Just toss rotten flesh into any furnace or smoker
- **💪 Better Nutrition**: Cooked flesh provides 4 hunger points and 0.25 saturation
- **🎯 Seamless Integration**: Works with existing cooking mechanics

*Turn your zombie encounters from waste into feast!*
